---
name: Bug report
about: Report something that isn't working as the spec / docs / code says it should
title: ""
labels: bug
---

<!--
See docs/triage.md for label conventions. At minimum, this issue
should carry `bug` (already applied). If it was discovered
operator-side (manual UI / CLI), also add `manual-ui`. Priority +
triage + cluster labels get applied during triage; you can leave
them blank or apply them if obvious.
-->

## Symptom

<!--
What you observed. Include exact error messages, stack traces, or
"the page rendered X but I expected Y." Specific > general.
-->

## Reproduction

<!--
Minimum steps to reproduce. Include commands, URLs, inputs.
-->

## Root cause (if known)

<!--
Optional. If you've already traced the cause, name the file +
line + the bug. If not, leave blank.
-->

## Severity

<!--
Operator impact. Is this blocking a workflow today? Does it have
a workaround? See docs/triage.md §3 for `priority:0-blocking`
criteria.
-->

## Related

<!--
- Other issues this looks like (same root cause, same surface)
- Spec sections affected, if any
-->
